cherrybrook.name: Cherrybrook
cherrybrook.description: Cherrybrook families depend on us for trusted Mac repairs. This family-focused suburb has high Mac adoption, and we're here to keep those devices running. From Greenway Park to New Line Road, quality repairs are close to home.
cherrybrook.localInfo: Cherrybrook's excellent schools mean many households have multiple Macs. We offer family discounts and prioritise repairs that support students' education needs.
cherrybrook.introParagraph: We diagnose at board level — resoldering fractured BGA joints, replacing blown backlight fuses, and recovering corrupted NAND. Households with three or four Apple devices need a technician who understands cumulative wear across shared machines.

whatWeFix.name: MacBook Battery
whatWeFix.desc: Depleted student cells swapped for full-day classroom runtime.

whatWeFix.desc: Retina panel replacement for school-bag damage.

whatWeFix.name: Keyboard Failure
whatWeFix.desc: Worn keys from heavy student typing restored.

whatWeFix.name: Mac Won't Turn On
whatWeFix.desc: SMC and power rail faults traced and repaired.

whatWeFix.desc: SSD upgrades and RAM expansion for aging family Macs.

commonIssues: Student MacBook Airs with batteries that die before the school day ends
Family iMacs choking on years of accumulated photos and school projects
MacBook screens cracked from being tossed into overstuffed school bags

Parental work laptops overheating during back-to-back video conferences
whyChoose: Multi-device family discounts available
Priority turnaround during school term
Component-level repairs, not part swapping
All work backed by warranty

faqs.q: Do you offer discounts for multiple family devices?
faqs.a: Yes. Bring in more than one Mac and we provide a combined quote with family pricing. It's designed for multi-device households.

faqs.q: How fast can you fix a student's MacBook?
faqs.a: Most student repairs — batteries, SSDs, keyboards — are same-day. We prioritise school devices during term to minimise study disruption.

faqs.q: Can you upgrade an older iMac instead of replacing it?
faqs.a: Usually yes. An SSD and fresh thermal paste can make a 2013-2017 iMac feel close to new at a fraction of replacement cost.

faqs.q: Is my child's data safe during the repair?
faqs.a: We never access personal files. If a repair risks data loss, we advise beforehand and offer a backup before proceeding.

cherrybrook.ctaText: Get your family's Macs diagnosed fast — no-obligation quotes on every device.

faqs.q: Can you fix surge damage to a Mac logic board?
faqs.a: Yes. Power surges typically blow specific voltage regulators. We identify and replace the failed components rather than swapping the entire board.

faqs.q: Do you support Macs used in home business setups?
faqs.a: Regularly. We handle everything from basic repairs to network troubleshooting and multi-monitor configuration for home offices.

faqs.q: My Mac overheats in my workshop — can you help?
faqs.a: Yes. We do deep internal cleaning, fan replacement, and thermal paste renewal. We can also advise on placement to reduce dust intake.

dural.ctaText: Book a thorough diagnostic — reliable repairs that last on rural properties.

faqs.q: Can you fix an old Mac that's running slowly?
faqs.a: Usually. An SSD upgrade and clean macOS install resolve most performance issues on 2012-2017 Macs for a fraction of replacement cost.

faqs.a: Yes. We diagnose GPU issues at board level — reballing, reflow, and replacement of failed graphics ICs depending on the specific fault.
